_doc: 投稿包模板集合 (Phase 4.8 /submission-pack 命令使用)。所有 {{VAR}} 占位符在写入项目目录前需替换。
code_availability_statement:
## Code Availability

All custom code used in this study is available at {{GITHUB_URL}} under the {{LICENSE}} license, and is archived at Zenodo (DOI: {{ZENODO_DOI}}). The repository includes README with installation instructions, expected runtime, and example input data.
competing_interests:
## Competing Interests

The authors declare {{COI_STATEMENT}}.

(Options: "no competing interests" / "the following competing interests: [details — patents, advisory roles, equity, consulting]")
funding:
## Funding

This work was supported by {{FUNDER_1}} (Grant No. {{GRANT_1}}) to {{PI_1}}, and {{FUNDER_2}} (Grant No. {{GRANT_2}}) to {{PI_2}}. The funders had no role in study design, data collection and analysis, decision to publish, or preparation of the manuscript.
graphical_abstract_spec:
## Graphical Abstract Specification

**File**: graphical_abstract.tif (or .png at ≥300 DPI)
**Dimensions**: 1200 × 1200 px (square) or 1200 × 800 px (Cell-style landscape)
**Style**: BioRender / Illustrator vector; no photos of unrelated objects
**Content rules**:
- Single key message — what was found, not what was done
- ≤6 visual elements + ≤4 short labels
- No bullet text, no full sentences
- Color palette = main figures palette (see configs/figure_palette.json)
- All text ≥8 pt at final size; no untranslated abbreviations
- AVOID: arrows pointing to multiple targets; before/after split unless clearly labeled

submission_checklist.item: Cover letter (cover_letter.md) — addressed to current Editor-in-Chief, mentions target journal
Main manuscript Full_Manuscript.docx (containing Abstract, Intro, Results, Discussion, Methods)
Supplementary Information (SI) PDF with SI Figures, SI Methods, SI Tables
Source data .xlsx (one tab per main figure panel)
Data Availability Statement in Methods or stand-alone section
Code Availability Statement (if any custom code)
CRediT author contributions — all 11 categories addressed
Competing Interests / COI statement
Funding statement with grant numbers
Highlights (3-5 bullets ≤85 char)
One-sentence summary / eTOC blurb
Graphical abstract (.tif/.png ≥300 DPI)
Suggested reviewers (≥3) with affiliations and emails
Opposed reviewers (with brief justification, if any)
ORCID IDs for all authors
Ethics statement (IRB / IACUC) if applicable
Informed consent statement if human subjects
Reporting checklist (ARRIVE / CONSORT / MIQE) signed
Title page with full author list, affiliations, corresponding author info
Abbreviations table from /merge auto-generated
